series_metadata.series_title: Time Study Analysis on District Hearing Officer''s Allowance Issues; Quarterly
series_metadata.series_description: This report provides information to monitor compliance with time frames as established by HB 107 for District Hearing Officer Allowance Issues. This report includes several analyses: calculations of Median Days for various time frames, claims receipt and claims heard analysis table, and a table of frequency distribution.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: from publish date of report. ; Electronic: from publish date of report
